name: Stealth Group Holdings Ltd
analysis: SGI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.2250, stop A$0.8167, target A$1.4000 (0.43:1) — then trail it.
